summary: Gas and oil are on a sharply divergent path. In BloombergNEF’s Economic Transition Scenario, oil demand peaks before the end of the decade, while gas demand continues to grow as expanding power systems seek reliable sources of generation. At the same time, constraints on everything from gas turbine supply chains to grid infrastructure are emerging as critical bottlenecks. So how does the global energy system evolve from here, and what do these competing pressures reveal about what lies ahead for

summary: A deadly cattle parasite was confirmed in the US for the first time in nearly a decade, posing the latest threat to a US herd already at its lowest level in 75 years.

summary: Foreign investors are piling into fast-tracked sales of shares in Turkish companies, seeing pockets of value in a market facing political turmoil at home and fallout from the Iran war.

title: Oil Falls After Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire Even as Clashes Persist

title_cn: 随着巴西工厂生产更多乙醇，糖期货上涨
summary: Raw sugar futures in New York advanced for the first time three days on expectations that Brazilian mills may allocate more cane to ethanol production, reducing sugar output during the current crushing season.

title: Economist Shah Says Texas Jobs Data Show Risks, Promise
title_cn: 经济学家沙阿表示德克萨斯州就业数据显示风险和希望
summary: Sonal Shah, an economist and former chief executive officer of the Texas Tribune, says job growth in the state is picking up in 2026 after a stagnant 2025. But temporary employment accounts for an outsize share of the gains, and the US immigration crackdown is crimping labor supply, she tells Bloomberg's Julie Fine. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK and France Finalize Postwar Hormuz Mine-Clearing Mission
title_cn: 英国和法国完成战后霍尔木兹扫雷任务
summary: The UK and France have finalized plans to lead a multinational mine-clearing mission in the Strait of Hormuz within days of an agreement between the US and Iran to reopen the waterway, according to people familiar with the matter.

summary: China’s Zhejiang Huayou Cobalt Ltd. plans to set up a lithium carbonate plant in Zimbabwe, according to the southern African country’s mines minister.

summary: The first sustained default cycle in credit in many years has already started and the market will see higher losses than it’s grown used to, Pacific Investment Management Co.’s chief investment officer warned.

summary: Nasdaq 100 futures lead US equities lower as Broadcom's sales growth forecast failed to meet investors' lofty expectations. Iran says there had been no recent progress in peace deal talks with the US, while fighting persists in Lebanon. Sharon Bell of Goldman Sachs discusses the difference in sector exposure in the US and European equity markets. Rhonda Vonshay Sharpe of the Women's Institute for Science, Equity and Race focuses on the inequality in the labor market. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: The new government in Novo Nordisk A/S’s home country of Denmark wants to test whether weight-loss drugs can help get more people into work, adding a new economic dimension to the debate over obesity treatments.

summary: Madhav Thattai, Executive Vice President & General Manager, Agentforce at Salesforce speaks with Sameer Hassan, Chief Technology & Digital Officer at Williams-Sonoma about the latest in AI at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 库存下降抵消了对伊朗的担忧，铜价上涨
summary: Copper edged higher after a rise in orders for metal in London Metal Exchange warehouses, bucking a broader downtrend on the exchange as traders weighed US President Donald Trump’s fraught push to reach a peace deal with Iran.

title: Apollo’s Zelter Expects High-Grade Debt Sales to Top US Treasuries
title_cn: Apollo 的 Zelter 预计高等级债券的销售将超过美国国债
summary: Jim Zelter, president at Apollo Global Management, says the “phenomenal and unprecedented” AI capex boom could cause issues for smaller companies looking to tap the public markets and says investment-grade debt sales will outpace net issuance of US Treasuries this year. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU Insurance Watchdog Warns on Loan Risks
title_cn: 欧盟保险监管机构对贷款风险发出警告
summary:
European insurers that want to ride the private credit boom need to grasp the risks they face, according to the region’s top watchdog for the industry. 

Speaking to Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua, Petra Hielkema, chair of the European Insurance and Occupational Pensions Authority, said the region has “a multitude” of insurers of varying size, some of which don’t yet have the necessary capabilities. 

Hielkema joined "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua" on Bloomberg TV. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin Has Longest Losing Streak Since August in Bruising Week
title_cn: 比特币在惨痛的一周中出现自八月以来最长的连续下跌
summary: Bitcoin is poised for its longest losing streak since August, weighed down by the Middle East conflict, liquidations of bullish bets and this week’s rare sale of tokens by the dominant corporate buyer.

title: Glazer Family Members Said to Study Manchester United Stake Sale
title_cn: 格雷泽家族成员据说正在研究曼联股权出售
summary:
Some members of the billionaire Glazer family have been debating whether to sell their stake in Manchester United FC, after more than 20 years of ownership that has often been blighted by fan protest, people familiar with the matter told Bloomberg. Several stakeholders in the US-based Glazer family have been studying the possibility of divesting part or all of their holdings in the English Premier League football club, according to the people. 

Deliberations come as Manchester United’s owners face a potential multibillion-pound bill to redevelop the club’s famous Old Trafford stadium in the coming years. On the other hand, the club’s recent qualification for the lucrative UEFA Champions League comes with fresh earnings potential, providing incentive to remain invested. 

Bloomberg's Tiwa Adebayo joined "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua" to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Absa’s Investors Oppose Plan to Boost Executive Pay
title_cn: Absa 投资者反对提高高管薪酬的计划
summary: Absa Group Ltd. faced opposition from some of its largest shareholders over a proposal to boost executive pay at the South African lender’s annual general meeting on Tuesday.

title: Ares' Blair Jacbobson: Disconnect Over Private Credit Headlines
title_cn: 阿瑞斯的布莱尔·雅各布森：因私人信贷头条新闻而断绝联系
summary:
Ares Management Corporation’s co-president Blair Jacobson said there’s a “real disconnect” between negative headlines about private credit and what the firm is seeing across its portfolio companies.

Jacobson said companies worldwide are reporting annual growth of 8% to 12%, and non-accrual rates are lower than the company has seen historically. He joined "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua" on Bloomberg TV. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia-Backed Robotics Startup Generalist AI Valued at $2 Billion
title_cn: Nvidia 支持的机器人初创公司 AI 通才估值达 20 亿美元
summary: The company raised $400 million in a funding round led by Radical Ventures

title: Broadcom Set for Biggest Drop in Over a Year on AI Outlook Miss
title_cn: 博通的人工智能展望将出现一年多来最大跌幅
summary: Broadcom Inc. shares fell in premarket trading, setting the stock up for the biggest drop in about 16 months, after the company delivered a disappointing forecast for artificial intelligence chip revenue.

title: Zurich Insurance Expands Data-Center Offering Beyond the US
title_cn: 苏黎世保险将数据中心服务扩展到美国以外
summary: Zurich Insurance Group Plc is widening its offering for data-center projects to Europe and South America as it seeks to profit from the global buildout of infrastructure linked to artificial intelligence.

title: Emerging-Market Stocks Fall as Broadcom Miss Disrupts AI Trade
title_cn: 博通失误扰乱人工智能贸易，新兴市场股市下跌
summary: Emerging-market equities headed for the sharpest drop in almost three weeks as Asian technology heavyweights retreated after a disappointing outlook from Broadcom Inc. raised doubts about the blistering artificial-intelligence rally.

title: Revolut Co-Founder, CTO Vlad Yatsenko to Step Down From Role
title_cn: Revolut 联合创始人兼首席技术官 Vlad Yatsenko 卸任
summary: Revolut Ltd.’s chief technology officer, Vlad Yatsenko, and Chief Executive Officer Nik Storonsky’s early partner, is stepping down from his position at the digital bank in July.

title: Netflix Top Tech Exec Stone on Integrating AI
title_cn: Netflix 顶级技术执行官 Stone 谈人工智能集成
summary: Elizabeth Stone, Chief Product & Technology Officer at Netflix discusses technology leadership and scaling the platform in the AI era with Bloomberg’s Emily Chang at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft’s AI Chief Says Anthropic Models Are Too Expensive
title_cn: 微软人工智能负责人表示人择模型太贵
summary: The software company’s AI chief is working to build cheaper in-house models

title: Polymarket Lets You Bet on Vibes
title_cn: Polymarket 让您押注 Vibes
summary: By taking bets on social media clout, the prediction market has made itself vulnerable to bots.

title: China’s Robotaxi Dilemma Shows AI Policy Tension Between Growth and Jobs
title_cn: 中国的机器人出租车困境显示了增长与就业之间的人工智能政策紧张
summary: China leads the world on robotaxis, but is finding that competitive edge comes with a price.

title: Arm’s $218 Billion Leap Makes It One of Market’s Priciest Stocks
title_cn: Arm 的股价跃升至 2180 亿美元，成为市场上最昂贵的股票之一
summary: Arm Holdings Plc has been a relatively expensive stock for investors to own since the company first issued American depositary receipts in 2023. But a wild surge that has nearly doubled the share price in a matter of weeks is pushing the valuation to levels investors rarely see.

title: Thailand’s Richest Man Plans $4.3 Billion Expansion Amid AI Boom
title_cn: 泰国首富计划在人工智能热潮中斥资 43 亿美元扩张
summary: Thailand’s richest man, Sarath Ratanavadi, plans to spend as much as 140 billion baht ($4.3 billion) through Gulf Development Pcl over the next five years to expand data centers and other infrastructure needed to support the artificial intelligence boom.

title: US Tech Sector Announces Most Job Cuts in Nearly Two Years
title_cn: 美国科技行业宣布近两年来最大规模裁员
summary: US technology companies in May announced the most job cuts in nearly two years as they ramp up spending on artificial intelligence.

title: Iran Says No Progress in US Talks | The Opening Trade 6/4/2026
title_cn: 伊朗表示与美国的谈判没有取得进展开盘交易 6/4/2026
summary:
Iran said there had been no recent progress in talks with the US over an interim peace deal, while fighting persisted in Lebanon despite Washington’s declaration of a ceasefire between Israel and the country.

Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said late Wednesday that “no tangible progress has been achieved in the negotiation process” with the US, according to the semi-official Tasnim news agency.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Boom Propels China Optical Maker to Top Weighting on CSI 300
title_cn: AI热潮推动中国光缆企业登上沪深300权重榜首
summary: A Chinese optical transceiver maker has overtaken a battery giant as the top-weighted firm in China’s equities benchmark, the latest sign of how a broadening AI rally is reshaping the world’s second-largest stock market.

title: AI Bubble 'Something to Look At,' BNP's Huynh Says
title_cn: 法国巴黎银行 (BNP) 的 Huynh 表示，人工智能泡沫“值得关注”
summary: Sophie Huynh, senior cross asset strategist at BNP Paribas Asset Management, discusses the risk of a so-called bubble in the artificial intelligence trade space. "What I'm looking at much more is tokens rationing," she tells Bloomberg Television. "There's anecdotes here and there that we're consuming so much tokens at this point that there's not going to be enough," Huynh says. She also discusses the impact of the ongoing conflict in the Middle East on markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SoftBank’s PayPay to Buy T&D’s Life Insurer for $840 Million
title_cn: 软银旗下 PayPay 将以 8.4 亿美元收购 T&D 人寿保险公司
summary: SoftBank Group Corp.’s payments unit is buying the life insurance unit of T&D Holdings Inc. for ¥134.3 billion ($840 million) to broaden its offerings and better compete in Japan’s ballooning fintech market.

title: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon on Running a Bank in the Age of AI | Odd Lots
title_cn: 高盛首席执行官大卫·所罗门谈人工智能时代的银行运营零股
summary: There's a lot of debate about the future of AI — not just whether it will produce the returns investors are expecting, but also if AI will lead to mass worker displacement. Big banks are the perfect prism through which to explore some of these questions. Not only are they deploying AI very quickly, but they have a wide range of workers who are using the technology, from back-office employees to junior analysts to the most senior investment bankers. We spoke with David Solomon, chairman and CEO of Goldman Sachs, about the impact of AI on the banking business, and why he does not predict a major white collar wipeout. We talk about the outlook for headcount, current conditions in capital markets, and the bank's role in the upcoming SpaceX IPO and Alphabet's historic equity capital raise. He also tells us about his early career in junk bonds and (with his love of electronic dance music) how AI is transforming music production. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon on Running a Bank in the Age of AI
title_cn: 高盛首席执行官大卫·所罗门谈人工智能时代的银行运营
summary: Why he doesn't see an AI jobs apocalypse coming to Wall Street.

title: Odd Lots: Goldman’s Solomon on Banks in the Age of AI (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的事情：高盛的所罗门谈人工智能时代的银行（播客）
summary: There’s a lot of debate about the future of AI — not just whether it will produce the returns investors are expecting, but also if AI will lead to mass worker displacement. title: AI Concentration Risk Is the Problem: 3-Minutes MLIV
title_cn: 人工智能集中风险是问题所在：3 分钟 MLIV
summary: Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson, Tom Mackenzie and Mark Cudmore break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bill Ackman’s Pershing Exits €1.4 Billion Universal Music Stake
title_cn: 比尔·阿克曼 (Bill Ackman) 的潘兴 (Pershing) 退出环球音乐 14 亿欧元的股份
summary: Bill Ackman sold his €1.42 billion ($1.65 billion) stake in Universal Music Group NV just days after the Amsterdam-listed company rejected a takeover bid by the hedge fund billionaire.

title: Kuwait Bears Brunt of Iranian Response to US Ship Attacks
title_cn: 科威特首当其冲受到伊朗对美国船只袭击事件的回应
summary: Kuwait, a staunch US ally, has become a key target of Iran as its ceasefire with Washington frays and their clashes escalate.

title: Democrats to Target Trump IRS Immunity in Hearing, Senate Votes
title_cn: 民主党人将在听证会和参议院投票中针对特朗普国税局豁免权
summary: The Treasury secretary has so far demurred, citing ongoing litigation and attorney-client privilege

title: Singapore Denies Forced Labor Claims After Trump Tariff Move
title_cn: 特朗普关税举措后，新加坡否认强迫劳动指控
summary: Singapore denied forced labor allegations from the US, responding after President Donald Trump proposed new tariffs linked to the practice in an attempt to rebuild his protectionist wall.

title: UK Job Cut Notices Surge to Highest Since 2020 as Iran War Bites
title_cn: 伊朗战争爆发，英国裁员通知激增至 2020 年以来最高
summary: The number of British workers that face losing their jobs jumped to its highest in more than five years, the latest sign that the labor market is deteriorating amid the economic effects of conflict in the Middle East.

title: Republican-Led House Votes to Stop Iran War, Rebuking Trump
title_cn: 共和党领导的众议院投票停止伊朗战争，谴责特朗普
summary: The move won’t end US military attacks and still faces a Senate vote.

title: Starmer Accuses Musk of Sowing Division in UK Over Murdered Teen
title_cn: 斯塔默指责马斯克在英国播种部门谋杀青少年
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer accused Elon Musk of stoking unrest in Britain after the world’s richest man seized on the murder of a British teen and said official UK police policy requires officers to be racist against White people.

title: India Seeks Deeper Venezuela Oil Ties After Rodríguez and Modi Meet
title_cn: 罗德里格斯与莫迪会面后，印度寻求与委内瑞拉加深石油联系
summary: India signaled interest in deeper energy ties with Venezuela, including sourcing crude supplies and investments in the country’s oil sector, after acting Venezuelan President Delcy Rodríguez held talks with Prime Minister Narendra Modi in New Delhi.

title: EU and Chinese Trade Chiefs Meet To Defuse Heightened Tensions
title_cn: 欧盟和中国贸易主管会面缓解紧张局势
summary: European Union and Chinese trade envoys met in Paris Thursday as the bloc weighs new restrictive measures to rebalance the economic relationship.

title: Indonesia’s Radical Export Plan Takes Effect as Questions Swirl
title_cn: 印尼激进的出口计划生效，质疑不断
summary: Lingering uncertainty around Indonesia’s commodity export rules means traders are holding up some shipments just as radical changes come into effect, adding to strains on Southeast Asia’s largest economy.

title: Thailand’s Thaksin to Head to Dubai After Royal Pardon Sets Him Free
title_cn: 泰国他信在皇家赦免后获释后将前往迪拜
summary: Once Thailand’s most powerful politician, Thaksin Shinawatra is returning to the city that served as his base during 15 years of exile as his influence at home fades.

title: Swiss May Extend Older Fighter Jets Over Delayed US F-35 Deal
title_cn: 瑞士可能因美国 F-35 交易推迟而延长旧型战斗机的采购期限
summary: Switzerland will review extending the lifespan of its current fighter jets because a proposed 6 billion-franc ($7.6 billion) deal to buy new aircraft from the US is caught up in a dispute over the price.

title: Kyle Refuses to Set India Deal Timeline Amid Spat Over Steel
title_cn: 凯尔拒绝在钢铁争端中设定印度交易时间表
summary: Business Secretary Peter Kyle declined to set a timeline to bring into force Britain’s free trade agreement with India after the Asian nation warned UK steel safeguards could prompt a rethink of tariff concessions.

title: France Under Macron Looks Like an AI Winner, for Now
title_cn: 马克龙领导下的法国目前看来是人工智能的赢家
summary: The French president has been an early advocate, touting his country’s tech talent and nuclear power.

title: Israel, Lebanon Reach Ceasefire as US Seeks to Revive Iran Talks
title_cn: 美国寻求重启伊朗谈判，以色列和黎巴嫩达成停火
summary: The US says Israel and Lebanon have agreed to a ceasefire if Hezbollah also stops fighting, in the latest attempt by the Trump administration to keep peace talks with Iran on track as political opposition to the war intensifies. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Italy, US and France at Odds Over Next Special Envoy to Bosnia
title_cn: 意大利、美国和法国在下任波斯尼亚特使问题上存在分歧
summary: Key nations tasked with selecting the next special envoy to Bosnia and Herzegovina are at odds over whom to appoint to the role and what kind of weight it should carry, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Is Mexico Safe? World Cup Fans Are About to Find Out
title_cn: 墨西哥安全吗？世界杯球迷即将揭晓
summary: The historic city of Guadalajara embodies the tension between soccer euphoria and the country’s festering security crisis.

title: France Calls US Tariffs Unjustified, Seeks to Finish Trade Pact
title_cn: 法国称美国关税不合理，寻求完成贸易协定
summary: French Finance Minister Roland Lescure called a new American tariff proposal unjustified, but said he hopes the move would lead to the European Union and US finally implementing their trade accord.

title: Farage’s Reform UK Gets £7 Million More From Crypto Donors
title_cn: Farage’s Reform UK 从加密货币捐助者那里获得了 700 万英镑的额外资金
summary: Nigel Farage’s Reform UK extended its record-breaking fundraising streak with another £7 million ($9.4 million) in donations from crypto investors, fueling concerns about the industry’s growing influence over the party tipped to run the British government after the next election.

title: Russia’s War Is Getting Too Expensive, Finance Officials Warn Putin
title_cn: 财务官员警告普京，俄罗斯的战争成本太高
summary:
Senior government officials have warned Russian President Vladimir Putin that spending on the war in Ukraine is on an unaffordable path.

It’s the most serious sign of internal division in Moscow since the full-scale invasion began, Anthony Halpin explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Romanian President Set to Nominate Adviser Tomac for Premiership
title_cn: 罗马尼亚总统将提名总理顾问托马克
summary: Romanian President Nicusor Dan is poised to nominate his adviser, Eugen Tomac, as prime minister in a bid to end a political crisis and tackle one of the European Union’s widest budget deficits, according to people familiar.

title: Streeting Says Labour Leadership Challenge Won't Be a 'Coronation'
title_cn: 斯特里廷称工党领导力挑战不会成为“加冕”
summary: Former Health Minister Wes Streeting vowed he would fight a battle against Mayor of Greater Manchester Andy Burnham if the two went head-to-head in a race for the leadership of the governing Labour Party. "He needs to set out his stall, I need to set out mine," Streeting said in conversation with Bloomberg’s Francine Lacqua at the SXSW London tech festival Wednesday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Says No Progress in US Talks as Lebanon Sees More Clashes
title_cn: 伊朗称美国谈判没有取得进展，黎巴嫩冲突加剧
summary: Iran said there had been no recent progress in talks with the US over an interim peace deal, while fighting persisted in Lebanon despite Washington’s declaration of a ceasefire between Israel and the country.

title: Japan Officials Met Metals, LNG Firms in Unusual Moscow Talks
title_cn: 日本官员在不同寻常的莫斯科会谈中会见了金属和液化天然气公司
summary: Japanese officials who visited Moscow last week met commodity exporters along with Russian government representatives in a rare high-level commercial contact between their countries since President Vladimir Putin ordered the 2022 full scale invasion of Ukraine.

title: What to Know As Swiss Prepare to Vote on 10 Million Population Cap
title_cn: 瑞士准备就 1000 万人口上限进行投票时需要了解什么
summary: The growing prominence of far-right political parties in Europe is pressuring governments to introduce stricter controls on immigration. Switzerland will take the idea to the next level on June 14 with a vote on whether to cap its population at 10 million.

title: China Sanctions First New Zealand Lawmakers Over Taiwan Trip
title_cn: 中国因台湾行制裁首批新西兰议员
summary: China has imposed its first travel bans on New Zealand lawmakers after they visited Taiwan, escalating Beijing’s efforts to isolate Taipei and deter foreign governments from engaging with the self-ruled democracy.

title: Women Take Majority of Cabinet Seats in First for Denmark
title_cn: 丹麦首次由女性占据内阁多数席位
summary: Denmark’s new cabinet reached a record level of female representation, with women outnumbering men for the first time in the Nordic country.
